title: Payments pending after risk-rules deployment
symptoms: Payments submitted after the morning release stay pending and validation workers crash while selecting a sanctions rule.
logs:
2026-07-23T09:01:13Z INFO transaction-validation-service validation-812 Evaluating risk rules payment_id=PAY-90021
2026-07-23T09:01:13Z ERROR transaction-validation-service validation-812 java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException: Index: 2 Size: 2 while selecting sanctions rule for payment_id=PAY-90021

title: Validated transfers cannot be posted because database pool is exhausted
symptoms: Validated payments fail to post and the ledger outbox backlog grows after database connection acquisition errors.
logs:
2026-07-23T09:01:15Z INFO ledger-posting-service ledger-441 Posting double-entry transaction payment_id=PAY-90021
2026-07-23T09:01:15Z ERROR ledger-posting-service ledger-441 DatabaseConnectionPoolExhaustedException: connection pool exhausted: active=2, max=2 payment_id=PAY-90021

title: Customer balance does not show recent transfer
symptoms: A customer sees an old available balance after a completed transfer and account read latency is elevated.

title: Payment validation failures
symptoms: Payments fail for some sanctions-rule responses
logs: 2026-07-23T09:01:20Z ERROR transaction-validation-service validation-813 IndexOutOfBoundsException at RuleResponseMapper.java:42

title: Risk-rule evaluation crashes during payment validation
symptoms: Payment validation crashes with an index-out-of-bounds error while selecting the sanctions decision, leaving the transaction unresolved.
logs:
2026-07-23T10:15:27.151Z INFO transaction-validation-service Evaluating risk rules payment_id=PAY-482912
2026-07-23T10:15:27.151Z ERROR transaction-validation-service request_id=REQ-1003 payment_id=PAY-482912 error_code=IndexOutOfBoundsException Index: 2 Size: 2
java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException: Index: 2 Size: 2
    at java.base/java.util.ImmutableCollections$AbstractImmutableList.outOfBounds(ImmutableCollections.java:333)
    at java.base/java.util.ImmutableCollections$List12.get(ImmutableCollections.java:585)
    at com.novabank.validation.TransactionValidationService.validate(TransactionValidationService.java:11)
    at com.novabank.validation.TransactionValidationApplication.main(TransactionValidationApplication.java:16)
